app.title: SyncTask
app.heroCatchphraseJa: 世界を繋ぐ、次世代型タスク管理
app.heroCatchphraseEn: Next-gen task management that connects the world
app.heroCatchphraseZh: 连接世界，下一代任务管理

auth.loginLink: Already have an account? Log in
auth.welcomeMessage: After signing up, set your username in SyncTask to start managing tasks.
auth.signupSuccess: Account created. If email confirmation is enabled, please confirm via the link sent to you.

username.setDescription: Shown when you share with others. You can change it later.
username.duplicateMessage: This username is already taken. Please choose another.

calendar.label: Calendar
calendar.createDescription: For projects and team sharing. You can invite members after creating.
calendar.renameDescription: Edit the name of the current calendar.

share.title: Sharing & members
share.inviteHint: Invite team members to this workspace

reminder.title: Reminder settings
reminder.description: Enter task name and how you want to be reminded.
reminder.autoRepeatNotice: Monthly reminders will auto-create a task on the same day next month when completed.
reminder.modalDescription: Enter task name and how you want to be reminded.
reminder.monthlyNote: Monthly reminders will auto-create a task on the same day next month when completed.

settings.deleteAccountDescription: All your data will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

about.title: About Us
about.skillsList: Digital Marketing｜Ad Operations｜Software Development｜Video Production｜Web Design｜SNS Management

contact.title: Contact
contact.messagePlaceholder: Please enter your question or feedback
contact.sentDetail: Message sent. Thank you for contacting us.
contact.error: Failed to send. Please try again later.

privacy.adsenseBody:
This site uses Google AdSense for third-party ad serving. Ad providers may use cookies to show ads based on your interests. You can disable personalized ads in your ad settings.

For how Google uses cookies in advertising, please see Google's policy and partner policies.
privacy.cookiesBody: We may use cookies to improve convenience and analyze access. Cookies are small text data stored in your browser. You can disable cookies in your browser settings; some features may not work if you do.
privacy.analyticsBody: We may use tools such as Google Analytics for access analysis in the future. In that case, we may use cookies to collect traffic data. We will update this policy and notify you when we start using such tools.
privacy.personalBody: We may collect personal information such as your email address when you register. We use it only to provide and operate the service, respond to inquiries, and for purposes set out in this policy. We do not provide it to third parties without your consent, except as required by law.

terms.useBody: These terms apply to your use of SyncTask (the "Service"). By using the Service, you agree to these terms. The Service provides task management and calendar features. Please use it appropriately.
terms.translationBody: The Service offers automatic translation of task names (e.g. Google Translation API or DeepL). We do not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of translations. Please use them as a reference and verify important content against the original text.
terms.prohibitedBody: You may not: gain unauthorized access or use another user's account; disrupt the operation of the Service; violate laws or public order; or engage in any other conduct we deem inappropriate. We may suspend your account if we find a violation.
terms.disclaimerBody: The Service is provided as is. We are not liable beyond what is permitted by law for changes, suspension, or termination of the Service, or for damages arising from its use.
